caption:
The neon tide lapped against my skin, hot and electric. 💦🌃 I adjusted the holo-lace on my shoulder, feeling the heat of the summer festival pulsing through the district. My black synthetic bikini shimmered under the violet streetlights, hugging curves that drew stares from every passing android.

I wasn’t here just for the heat. 🌡️ I needed to get close. A shadow slipped near the railing, and I knew the target was near. The scent of ozone and jasmine filled the air. I turned, my heart racing against the cool hum of my implants.

He didn’t speak, just smiled. A cybernetic eye glinted red, scanning my pulse. His hand brushed my hip, sending a spark of static electricity down my spine. 🖤⚡ The crowd blurred into lights as the world tilted on its axis.

We moved into the shadows, breathless and electric. The night was ours to steal. 💃🔥

#CyberpunkSummer #NeonNights #SciFiErotica #FutureFashion #UrbanAdventure #CyberBabe
